assertions.assertion: Output sets SaveTokens = true on the OpenIdConnect handler options
Output includes 'offline_access' in the OIDC scope list to enable refresh tokens
Output wires up RevokeRefreshTokenAsync() in the cookie OnSigningOut event handler
Output calls AddOpenIdConnectAccessTokenManagement() to register user token management services
Output registers a named HTTP client using AddUserAccessTokenHttpClient with the user's access token
